Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to generate 20 thought provoking open ended questions about a complex smartphone supply chain process The questions should focus on discovering more insights potential issues strategies for improvement implications of various decisions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I should not provide any SQL queries just the questions The questions should be open ended and thought provoking not yes no questions They should encourage deep thinking about various aspects of the supply chain

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let me brainstorm questions across different dimensions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: RD and Design How do design decisions impact the supply chain How does RD coordinate with suppliers early in the design process Suppliers and Sourcing How does the company manage supplier risk What about geopolitical risks affecting component supply How are quality metrics standardized across international suppliers Manufacturing How to balance automation with labor in Malaysia How does 24 7 operation affect worker conditions and quality How are quality checks integrated into the assembly line Logistics and Transportation Air vs sea freight trade offs How to handle customs and regulatory compliance efficiently How to optimize for sustainability while maintaining speed Inventory and Demand How does forecasting accuracy affect inventory JIT vs aggregated shipments trade offs How to handle demand uncertainty in different markets Distribution How to optimize last mile delivery Direct to consumer vs retail trade offs How to handle VIP pre order customers without disrupting regular flow Quality and Compliance How to handle product recalls efficiently How to ensure compliance across different regulatory frameworks How to balance cost with environmental regulations Technology and Analytics How can machine learning improve forecasting How to integrate data across multiple systems and partners What about cybersecurity risks in digital supply chains Sustainability How to reduce carbon footprint How to ensure ethical labor practices across the chain Risk Management What happens if a major supplier fails How to handle currency fluctuations How to prepare for disruptions pandemics natural disasters Strategic How to balance cost speed quality and sustainability How to build resilience into the supply chain How to leverage emerging technologies

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me review these to make sure they are Open ended not yes no Thought provoking Cover different aspects insights issues strategies implications Not requiring SQL Relevant to the process described

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I think these 20 questions are solid Let me make them polished and well organized

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill present them in a clear numbered list without grouping them into categories since the user just asked for a list of questions But I could optionally group them for better readability

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Actually looking again Ill keep them as a simple numbered list since the prompt says just list the questions
